docs.title: 2026-06-25 - belief-by-belief audit (starting cb:a098)
docs.description: Covers the node-by-node belief audit opened on cb:a098 - its split into a directive plus inference, and the schema questions raised: generalizing atomicity past primitives, a negative-case field, mood living in kind. Use when revisiting a098 or those decisions.

docs.title: Threads
docs.description: Use when orienting to the persisted prose threads - working conversations captured as clean readable exchanges, one file per thread.
